steps.title: Use the historical warning
steps.content: The passage warns scholars not to impose present-day beliefs or assumptions on Tanner and his contemporaries. Forgetting that warning creates a risk of using the wrong historical standards.

steps.title: Choose the consequence
steps.content: B claims Tanner's views are conflated with contemporaries' views, C shifts away from the painting, and D invents an intended critique. The supported consequence is historically inappropriate judgment. The answer is A.
